source_quote: Adam has autonomously generated functional genomics hypotheses about the yeast Saccharomyces cerevisiae and experimentally tested these hypotheses by using laboratory automation (King et al. 2009).
showcases its potential across six diverse tasks ... while exhibiting advanced capabilities for (semi-)autonomous experimental design and execution (Boiko et al. 2023).
After each experiment the agent is given execution results and conditionally re-plans the next experiment; simulated review follows the write-up as a distinct evaluation stage (Lu et al. 2024).
display_role_source: Ideation gate; run feedback; terminal review
display_role_source_ko: 아이디어 gate; 실행 피드백; 종결 review

source_quote: Performance metrics, training dynamics, plot quality, and stage-specific evaluators control best-first node expansion and stage transitions; reliability of these internal search signals is not independently evaluated. The automated paper reviewer is a separate terminal assessment layer (Lu et al. 2026, Nature).
display_role_source: Novelty refinement; tree/stage control; terminal review
display_role_source_ko: 신규성 개선; 트리/stage 통제; 종결 review

source_quote: the automated reviewer over-estimates quality by +2.3 points relative to human PhD students (Schmidgall et al. 2025).
a unified closed-loop multi-agent framework ... idea generation, methodology, experiment execution, and result feedback across twelve tasks (Zhang et al. 2025).
